title: session_parts helper centralizes API-URL + account-ID extraction across all method wrappers
description: Every method wrapper (chat_get, message_query, message_create, etc.) calls session_parts(session) as its first step to extract (api_url, account_id) and return a uniform InvalidSession error if the session has no primary JMAP Chat account. This is correct because the alternative — inlining the extraction at each call site — would scatter 10+ copies of the same boilerplate and make it easy for a future method to forget the account-ID check. A future contributor might suggest passing api_url and account_id directly as parameters instead of a Session, to avoid the per-call extraction. That would push the extraction responsibility onto every caller and lose the uniform error path. The session_parts helper is private and its contract is documented in the function comment.
